evals.prompt: Research and fill the 'Money & currency' section of the germany draft guide (src/content/guides/germany.json) with verified, current facts a traveler can act on — cash vs card reality, ATM advice, tipping. Keep the rest of the guide untouched.
evals.expected_output: germany.json's Money & currency panel filled with sourced facts; every perishable fact sourced-and-dated, ≈, ⚠, or omitted; draft:true intact; build passes; a verification ledger and completion report in the agent's summary.
assertions: money-section-filled: the Money & currency panel body in the edited germany.json is non-empty and substantive (not a stub)
no-bare-perishable-facts: every perishable money fact (fees, tipping figures, limits) carries a legal state — a sourced/dated claim, an ≈ prefix, or a ⚠ flag; no bare unsourced figures
draft-flag-preserved: germany.json still has draft: true
scope-respected: only the Money & currency content (plus at most the verified stamp) differs from the original scaffold — no other sections rewritten
verification-ledger-present: the report includes a ledger table with source (tier + URL) and checked-on dates per fact
completion-report-present: the report ends with the flagged/omitted/conflicts completion summary
gold-standard-depth: coverage is comparable to the denmark guide's money guidance (cash vs card reality, tipping norms, ATM/DCC specifics) rather than generic filler

evals.prompt: The SPAREX Dongdaemun jimjilbang in the korea guide changed its daytime entry price to ₩14,000 (enter by 20:00). Update the guide (src/content/guides/korea/ — find the group file the fact lives in).
evals.expected_output: Both touchpoints of the SPAREX price (budget note + Day 1 body) updated with the new figure and a fresh verification flag; no stale ₩12,000 SPAREX reference anywhere; continuity sweep evidenced; build passes; completion report present.
assertions: both-touchpoints-updated: BOTH SPAREX price touchpoints (the budget-section note AND the Day 1 itinerary body) show ₩14,000
no-stale-price: no SPAREX-related ₩12,000 daytime figure remains anywhere in the edited korea guide files
verification-carried: the changed figure carries its verification state as written (≈/⚠ flag or dated note), not a bare number
continuity-evidence: the report shows the whole guide was swept for touchpoints (not just one line edited)
completion-report-present: the report ends with the flagged/omitted/conflicts completion summary
